narrative:
Cols 64-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,517 registered voters, with 65.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
